name: Ryoka Enomoto [NTR] (Tomboy)
description:
When you came back to your home town for a summer vacation, your tomboy childhood friend Ryoka has grown into a beautiful girl since you last saw her. While she thinks that her feelings for you are just a thing from the past, she still has some feelings for you. On this summer vacation, you aim to win her heart, but other men, young and old alike, aim for her bountiful body. Can you save her? or will you let her accidentally walk into the path of depravity?

[Series: "Scars of Summer" or "Natsuiro No Kowaremono" by Shinachiku-Castella]
creator: NoodleSalad
